LanguageData.PM_HyperspaceStorage_EmptyInspect: Unassigned. Select an item stack to set the stored resource.
LanguageData.PM_HyperspaceStorage_EjectingInspect: Ejection in progress. Deposits and withdrawals are temporarily disabled.
LanguageData.PM_HyperspaceStorage_SelectItemDesc: Select an eligible item stack on this map. This locks the cabinet to that resource and requests its first hauling job.
LanguageData.PM_HyperspaceStorage_EjectOneDesc: Eject up to one full stack. The resource assignment is cleared only if the cabinet becomes empty.
LanguageData.PM_HyperspaceStorage_EjectTenDesc: Eject up to ten full stacks. The resource assignment is cleared only if the cabinet becomes empty.
LanguageData.PM_HyperspaceStorage_EjectAllDesc: Eject all stored resources over time, then clear the cabinet's resource assignment.
LanguageData.PM_HyperspaceStorage_AlreadyEjecting: An ejection request is already in progress.
LanguageData.PM_HyperspaceStorage_InvalidItem: This item cannot be virtualized safely by hyperspace storage.
LanguageData.PM_HyperspaceStorage_Reject_Forbidden: A forbidden item cannot be assigned to hyperspace storage.
LanguageData.PM_HyperspaceStorage_Reject_ForceDeny: This item's mod explicitly disallows hyperspace storage.
LanguageData.PM_HyperspaceStorage_Reject_Food: Food cannot be stored in hyperspace storage.
LanguageData.PM_HyperspaceStorage_Reject_Rottable: Items with a rot timer cannot be stored in hyperspace storage.
LanguageData.PM_HyperspaceStorage_Reject_MedicalConsu: Medicine and drugs cannot be stored.
LanguageData.PM_HyperspaceStorage_Reject_NotItem: Only haulable items can be stored.
LanguageData.PM_HyperspaceStorage_Reject_NotStackable: Only stackable items with a stack limit above one can be stored.
LanguageData.PM_HyperspaceStorage_Reject_PerInstance: Items whose concrete material must be preserved cannot be stored safely.
LanguageData.PM_HyperspaceStorage_Reject_StatefulComp: Items with quality, art, ingredients, biocoding, or other unique component state cannot be stored safely.
LanguageData.PM_HyperspaceStorage_CancelAssignmentDes: Clear the selected resource before the first item is deposited.
